'''wathaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dockman|dockman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-th-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dockman|dockman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wathaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæthæjæth|wæthæjæth]] || [[word:wæthæjæj|wæthæjæj]] || [[word:wæthæjæsh|wæthæjæsh]] || [[word:wæthæjæ|wæthæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wathathajath|wathathajath]] || [[word:wathathajaj|wathathajaj]] || [[word:wathathajash|wathathajash]] || [[word:wathathaja|wathathaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wathajath|wathajath]] || [[word:wathajaj|wathajaj]] || [[word:wathajash|wathajash]] || [[word:wathaja|wathaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wathafjath|wathafjath]] || [[word:wathafjaj|wathafjaj]] || [[word:wathafjash|wathafjash]] || [[word:wathafjaf|wathafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wathajatha|wathajatha]] || [[word:wathajaja|wathajaja]] || [[word:wathajasha|wathajasha]] || [[word:wathajaka|wathajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wathajath|wathajath]] || [[word:wathajaj|wathajaj]] || [[word:wathajash|wathajash]] || [[word:wathaja|wathaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wathajathal|wathajathal]] || [[word:wathajajal|wathajajal]] || [[word:wathajashal|wathajashal]] || [[word:wathajakal|wathajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wathajathatha|wathajathatha]] || [[word:wathajajaja|wathajajaja]] || [[word:wathajashasha|wathajashasha]] || [[word:wathajaka|wathajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wathajathan|wathajathan]] || [[word:wathajajan|wathajajan]] || [[word:wathajashan|wathajashan]] || [[word:wathajakan|wathajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wathajathaoro|wathajathaoro]] || [[word:wathajajaoro|wathajajaoro]] || [[word:wathajashaoro|wathajashaoro]] || [[word:wathajakaoro|wathajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
